name: Template Select
description: The `template` Select platform allows you to create a Select with templated values using [lambdas](https://esphome.io/automations/templates#config-lambda).

config_entries.label: Name
config_entries.description: The name for the select. At least one of **id** and **name** must be specified.

config_entries.label: Icon
config_entries.description: Manually set the icon to use for the select in the frontend.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval on which to update the select by executing the `lambda`. Defaults to `60s`.

config_entries.label: Options
config_entries.description: The list of options this Select has.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for code generation. At least one of **id** and **name** must be specified.

config_entries.label: Disabled By Default
config_entries.description: If true, then this entity should not be added to any client's frontend, (usually Home Assistant) without the user manually enabling it (via the Home Assistant UI). Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Entity Category
config_entries.description: The category of the entity. See [https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/#generic-properties](https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/#generic-properties) for a list of available options. Set to `""` to remove the default entity category.

config_entries.label: Initial Option
config_entries.description: The option to set the option to on setup if not restored with `restore_value`. Cannot be used with `lambda`. Defaults to the first option in the `options` list.

config_entries.label: Internal
config_entries.description: Mark this component as internal. Internal components will not be exposed to the frontend (like Home Assistant). Only specifying an `id` without a `name` will implicitly set this to true.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: Lambda to be evaluated every update interval to get the current option of the select.

config_entries.label: Optimistic
config_entries.description: Whether to operate in optimistic mode - when in this mode, any command sent to the Template Select will immediately update the reported state. Cannot be used with `lambda`. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Restore Value
config_entries.description: Saves and loads the state to RTC/Flash. Cannot be used with `lambda`. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Set Action
config_entries.description: The action that should be performed when the remote (like Home Assistant's frontend) requests to set the Select option. The new option is available to lambdas in the `x` variable.
